queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between savings account balances below 100 DM and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of having no checking account status on the determinants of increased credit risk.
Analysis of loan duration in months as a significant driver of elevated credit default likelihood.
